summary: Backend testing completed for Tap Game Limits and Referral Subscription Reward System. All 24 tests passed (1 skipped). Tap game correctly implements PRC per tap based on subscription plan (Explorer=0.1, Startup=0.5, Growth=1.0, Elite=2.0) with 100 daily tap limit for all plans. Referral reward system logic is implemented correctly.

minor.issue: Inconsistent field naming: vip_payments collection uses 'user_id' for user-submitted payments but 'user_uid' for admin-created subscriptions. The referral reward check queries 'user_id' which may miss admin-granted subscriptions.

action_items: Consider standardizing vip_payments collection to use consistent field name (either 'user_id' or 'user_uid') across all payment creation endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: Line 5137-5140: Referral reward check queries 'user_id' but admin subscription endpoint (line 9226) uses 'user_uid'. This inconsistency may cause referral rewards to not trigger for admin-granted subscriptions.
The tap game implementation correctly uses prc_per_tap_config dict with proper rates for all plans
Daily tap limit of 100 is correctly enforced for all subscription plans
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created with prefixes TEST_TAP_ and TEST_PLAN_ for various subscription plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tap game and referral reward system fully tested. All PRC rates verified: Explorer=0.1, Startup=0.5, Growth=1.0, Elite=2.0 PRC per tap. Daily limit is 100 taps for all plans. Referral reward system checks for Startup users with 10+ paid referrals in 7-day rolling window. One-time lifetime reward flag 'referral_subscription_reward_claimed' prevents duplicate rewards.

tap_game_explorer.details: 0.1 PRC per tap, 10 PRC daily potential, 100 tap limit

tap_game_startup.details: 0.5 PRC per tap, 50 PRC daily potential, 100 tap limit

tap_game_growth.details: 1.0 PRC per tap, 100 PRC daily potential, 100 tap limit

tap_game_elite.details: 2.0 PRC per tap, 200 PRC daily potential, 100 tap limit

daily_tap_limit.details: 100 taps daily for all plans, correctly enforced

tap_limit_exceeded_error.details: Returns 400 error when daily limit reached

partial_taps_tracking.details: Correctly tracks remaining taps across multiple sessions

referral_code_generation.details: Referral codes generated for all users

referral_reward_eligibility.details: Startup plan requirement and one-time flag verified

prc_calculation.details: PRC earned = taps * prc_per_tap correctly calculated
